title: Q3 Planning — Engineering Leadership
objective: Align on Q3 engineering priorities, capacity allocation, and dependency risks before board prep.
prep_items: Review Q2 OKR scorecard (shared in Slack #eng-leads)
Bring top 3 risks for your area with mitigation options
Confirm open headcount and backfill status
background: Board meeting is June 20. CFO requested a single engineering narrative covering platform modernization, reliability investments, and product velocity. This session produces the draft narrative and owner assignments.
